id.description: Lowercase, hyphen-separated. Matches what users type: `doc0 read stripe`.

aliases.description: Extra strings the CLI matches against. Keep them meaningful (not 'docs', 'api').

sourceType.description: Only 'url' is supported in the community registry. Local bundles go through `doc0 add`.

source.description: The docs root URL. Prefer sites that expose /llms.txt or /llms-full.txt for fast MCP access.

description.description: Short one-liner. Shows up in `doc0 ls` and MCP `list_docs`.

versions.description: Optional explicit versions (e.g. ["18", "17"]). Builder emits one artifact per version.

build.description: Optional builder overrides for hosted bundle generation.

disabled.description: When true, skip hosted bundle generation for this entry.

maxPages.description: Override max pages ingested for this source (0 means no cap beyond discovery limits).

locale.description: Optional locale hint passed to the ingest pipeline (e.g. "en", "pt-br").

version.description: Optional source version tag (docs release, date, or commit-ish).

snapshotUrl.description: Optional immutable snapshot URL for reproducible retrieval.

embedModel.description: Optional embedding model hint for hosted hybrid retrieval.
